message:
fix(c_interop): Improve C extension module from-import handling

- Add fromImport() helper to registry.zig for from-import semantics
- Fix sentinel mismatch bug in tryLoadSubmoduleExtension (used wrong pos)
- Fix PyImport_ImportModuleLevel to process fromlist parameter
- Skip dotted module names in generator.zig (only import root modules)

This fixes compilation errors for C extension from-imports like:
  from numpy import array  # Works

Known limitation: Pure Python subpackages of C extensions (like
numpy.testing) require the Python interpreter to run __init__.py.
These still fail at runtime but with a clearer error message.

Test results: 2/12 numpy tests now pass (was 0)
